title: Menu Keyart
description: This resourcepack replaces the main menu panorama with a high quality version of the corresponding keyart for that version!
body:
This resourcepack replaces the main menu panorama with a high quality version of the corresponding keyart for that version!

# Install guide:
1. Download/add the resourcepack to your profile.
2. In-game: Head over to '_Options_' -> '_Resourcepacks_', and select the resourcepack.
3. Enjoy!

More versions for older versions of the game are coming soon!
